title: nephrodium keckii
intro: Nephrodium keckii, also known as Keck's fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties that help to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs. The plant's health benefits also extend to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Nephrodium keckii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
